lines.speaker: Veos
lines.text: Hello again, [player name]! What can I do for you?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Have you got any quests for me?

lines.speaker: Veos
lines.text: As a matter of fact, [player name], I do...

lines.speaker: Veos
lines.text: I have a client from the mainland interested in some more knowledge surrounding the houses of Kourend. Do you think you'd be able to retrieve it for me?

lines.speaker: Veos
lines.text: I was just going to do it myself but as you're quite new around here, this might be a good opportunity for you to get to know the kingdom a bit better.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Sounds interesting! How can I help?

lines.speaker: Veos
lines.text: Take this scroll.

lines.speaker: Veos
lines.text: My client is interested in the hierarchy and general social organisation of Great Kourend; how it differs from the mainland, per se.

lines.speaker: Veos
lines.text: That scroll is special. When written on with a particular type of quill, my client will see what you're writing without anything being seen on the scroll itself.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Wait, wait! I'm not spying for somebody am I?

lines.speaker: Veos
lines.text: Not exactly... My client simply wishes to keep his 'knowledge gathering' on the down low before he makes his appearance.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: That seems fair. Who should I speak to in order to find out more about the houses?

lines.speaker: Veos
lines.text: There's many a man and woman who could give you the information you need, but General store owners in house will likely be your best bet. They should know enough about their houses, and always seem up

lines.speaker: Veos
lines.text: for a chat.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Good call. What about this special quill you mentioned?

lines.speaker: Veos
lines.text: Simply touching a normal feather onto the paper should synchronise their magical ability to work together. You don't need any ink.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Right, I'll return to you when I have the information your client needs.

lines.speaker: Veos
lines.text: See you soon.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I'm busy at the moment, actually. Not now.

lines.speaker: Veos
lines.text: Very well. Do come back if you wish to help out my client.

sections.title: Regath, the Arceuus General Store Owner

lines.speaker: Regath
lines.text: What do you require, traveller? I deal in many things.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Can I ask you about the Arceuus house?

lines.speaker: Regath
lines.text: This house holds knowledge many would deem unsafe to share. Why should I be so trusting to you?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Well, I'm a...

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Uhm...

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: A journalist! Yes, a journalist from the mainland. I want to let the wider world know of how this incredible house works.

lines.speaker: Regath
lines.text: Someone willing to share knowledge of our great house to many others?

lines.speaker: Regath
lines.text: Very well, then. The rest of the world could certainly do with learning about our great library.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: So what exactly is it the Arceuus house brings to Great Kourend?

lines.speaker: Regath
lines.text: The Arceuus house is filled with literary and magical scholars. Lead by the great Trobin Arceuus, as a leader, he assists in pushing the limit of our knowledge surrounding magical abilities, religion and the crafting of

lines.speaker: Regath
lines.text: runic energy. He cares not for petty control, focusing instead on the expansion of knowledge within Great Kourend.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: How do people start gaining favour in Arceuus?

lines.speaker: Regath
lines.text: Those seeking favour within our household start with a particularly labour intensive job.

lines.speaker: Regath
lines.text: Our library, as grand as it is, still requires maintenance... constantly.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Why should I gain favour in Arceuus?

lines.speaker: Regath
lines.text: Our great library filled with millennia of knowledge; runic, magical and religious, are but small findings compared to the power of the Dark Altar.

lines.speaker: Regath
lines.text: Reanimation of life... that's where our studies currently lie. This knowledge could be yours.

lines.speaker: Regath
lines.text: What is the matter, journalist?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I... I don't know.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I must have caught my finger with the quill. Apologies; please continue.

lines.speaker: Regath
lines.text: Very well. As mentioned, rewards for loyalty within our household are priceless. The sharing of our research surrounding re-animation and magic is but child's play to the knowledge we share to the most loyal of our

lines.speaker: Regath
lines.text: house; the knowledge of Blood and Soul runecrafting.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Thanks for your help, Regath!

lines.speaker: Regath
lines.text: You're welcome. Spread the word of this great house with the new knowledge you have gained, and perhaps be more careful with how you hold your scroll in the future...

sections.title: Horace, the Hosidius General Store Owner

lines.speaker: Horace
lines.text: Welcome to my shop. Would you like to buy or sell something?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Can I ask you about the Hosidius house?

lines.speaker: Horace
lines.text: Well, well my friend! I've lived in this great and glorious house all of my life. I'd be happy to share with you anything you'd like to know!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What is it that Hosidius provides for Great Kourend?

lines.speaker: Horace
lines.text: The Hosidius house is filled with keen and skilled farmers alike! Lead by the incredibly efficient Kandur Hosidius, his intelligent resourcefulness ensures optimal agricultural production.

lines.speaker: Horace
lines.text: Our fields stretch as far as the eye can see. With incredible teamwork and group efforts, the ability to provide the majority of Great Kourend's people with both food and herbal supplies is quite literally the fruits

lines.speaker: Horace
lines.text: of our labour.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: How do people start gaining favour in Hosidius?

lines.speaker: Horace
lines.text: Not into your back-breaking field maintenance or fertiliser creation? Those wishing to gain favour within our city may need to maintain such tediousness for a small while, though stick to it. The rewards for

lines.speaker: Horace
lines.text: that painful work are nothing short of great!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Why should I gain favour with Hosidius?

lines.speaker: Horace
lines.text: Access to our personal kitchens, Spirit Tree patch and Allotment space is lovely. That being said, our vinery and Tithe farm are world class and exclusive to only the most loyal of our house.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Thanks for your help, Horace!

lines.speaker: Horace
lines.text: Anytime, friend! Feel free to pop along if you ever need any wares!

sections.title: Munty, the Lovakengj General Store Owner

lines.speaker: Munty
lines.text: Can I help you, human?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Can I ask you about the Lovakengj house?

lines.speaker: Munty
lines.text: Why I'd be happy to have a chat! I do enjoy talking about this great house of ours.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What is it that Lovakengj provides for Great Kourend?

lines.speaker: Munty
lines.text: The Lovakengj house is filled with incredibly skilled blacksmiths. Lead by Vulcana Lovakengj, her incredible leadership and intelligent material saving skills pave the way for future blacksmiths.

lines.speaker: Munty
lines.text: Armours, weaponry, tools and structures - our house supplies Kourend with all of these to the finest standards known to Dwarf and Human alike.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: How do people start gaining favour in Lovakengj?

lines.speaker: Munty
lines.text: Those seeking favour within our household start with a dirty job.

lines.speaker: Munty
lines.text: Creating dynamite and mining in the sulphur mine isn't a pretty job, but someone has to do it!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Why should I gain favour with Lovakengj?

lines.speaker: Munty
lines.text: Those who endure our daunting introductory tasks are rewarded greatly - being taught to create the armour worn by the very soldiers of the Shayzien army, along with access to our Blast Mine - the rewards able to be

lines.speaker: Munty
lines.text: reaped by the most loyal of our house are nothing to be scoffed at!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Thanks for your help, Munty!

lines.speaker: Munty
lines.text: Anytime! Come back soon!

sections.title: Leenz, the Port Piscarilius General Store Owner

lines.speaker: Leenz
lines.text: A great adventurer, from afar? How may I help with my repertoire?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Can I ask you about the Piscarilius house?

lines.speaker: Leenz
lines.text: If it's Piscarilius information you seek, it's in my brain that you must peek!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: You're certainly a chirpy woman! What is it that Piscarilius house provides for Great Kourend?

lines.speaker: Leenz
lines.text: Within the Piscarilius house, you'll find, great fisherman, traders, pirates and I. All lead, by our ruthless leader, Shauna Piscarilius, none yet to supersede her.

lines.speaker: Leenz
lines.text: No surprise if you meet her, her tactics are ruthless. Her demeanour renders, all pirates toothless.

lines.speaker: Leenz
lines.text: Our great shore and trading, have treasures to be found, providing export and fish, in quantities abound.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: How do people start gaining favour in Port Piscarilius?

lines.speaker: Leenz
lines.text: Repairing net cranes, and gathering bait, newcomers to the port, well this is their fate... It's labour intensive, and dirty work, though stick to it friend, 'till your arms are inert.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Why should I gain favour in Piscarilius?

lines.speaker: Leenz
lines.text: Our shore is brimming, with gold from the sea, the most loyal of our people, are handed the key. We'll let you stand on our shores and collect, the great anglerfish; other houses... covet?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hang on a second... that last one didn't rhyme too well!

lines.speaker: Leenz
lines.text: Listen here pal, you don't mess with people in Piscarilius. Do you want happy rhyming Leenz, or angry, gruff and pain-inflicting Leenz?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Happy rhyming Leenz, please! Thanks for your help!

lines.speaker: Leenz
lines.text: Anytime, my adventuring friend, enjoy your time in Great Kourend!

sections.title: Jennifer, the Shayzien General Store Owner

lines.speaker: Jennifer
lines.text: What're yer looking for, me luv'?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Can I ask you about the Shayzien house?

lines.speaker: Jennifer
lines.text: Well I could give you some info if that's all yer wantin'. Gets lonely in 'ere while me mates are out there fightin' the good war!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What is it that Shayzien provides for Great Kourend?

lines.speaker: Jennifer
lines.text: Phwoar, what don' we do? This 'ouse is filled with officers and the like. Lead by our rig'rous leader Shiro Shayzien, 'e ensures ultimate justice and safety for the entirety of Great Kourend.

lines.speaker: Jennifer
lines.text: Our soldiers fight off the constant threat of the lizardman, while our 'ighly trained medics 'eal them from battle. Strict in combat trainin' and discipline. Law, order and defence. These are the words we live by!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: How do people start gaining favour in Shayzien?

lines.speaker: Jennifer
lines.text: Don't get us wrong, me luv', it ain't all pretty. Those who're lookin' to gain favour within this household need to 'elp in 'ealing our fallen soldiers and tackling organised crime... It's 'ard work! That bein' said...

lines.speaker: Jennifer
lines.text: The rewards for the most loyal of this 'ouse are great. The 'onour to train alongside our elite guards and wear our prestigious armour, while also fightin' on the front line against the lizardman forces. The spoils of wars are

lines.speaker: Jennifer
lines.text: grand.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Why should I gain favour with Shayzien?

lines.speaker: Jennifer
lines.text: The rewards for the most loyal of this 'ouse are great. The 'onour to train alongside our elite guards and wear our prestigious armour, while also fightin' on the front line against the lizardman forces.

lines.speaker: Jennifer
lines.text: The spoils of wars are grand.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Thanks for your help, Jennifer!

lines.speaker: Jennifer
lines.text: That's alright petal, you go'un and have fun.

lines.speaker: Veos
lines.text: Hello again, [player name]! What can I do for you?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I have gathered information from all of the houses.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I could hear a voice, Veos... in my head! As if it whispered in my ear to return to you!

lines.speaker: Veos
lines.text: Yes, I heard it too... they mentioned that your task was complete.

lines.speaker: Veos
lines.text: Let me take those items off your hands.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: That reminds me, Veos! I didn't sign up to this with the knowledge that my mind would not only be entered but that there was a possibility of severely damaging my hand!

lines.speaker: Veos
lines.text: If it makes you feel any better, my client sends their apologies. It wasn't intentional. Needless to say, something you said provoked emotion...

lines.speaker: Veos
lines.text: Namely...

lines.speaker: Veos
lines.text: The Dark Altar...

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: If I knew mentioning the Dark Altar would upset them so much, I'd have not written that bit of information down on the scroll!

lines.speaker: Veos
lines.text: Well that's just the thing, [player name]. My client is pleased you found such information. Tell me... Would you be willing to do one last thing for him?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Well, I don't necessarily believe I have much of a choice!

lines.speaker: Veos
lines.text: I'm certainly glad you're able to assist once again.

lines.speaker: Veos
lines.text: My client will be most pleased.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: So what exactly is it your client now wants me to do?

lines.speaker: Veos
lines.text: My client requires... another simple task. He assures me that it will be the last. Take this orb. You must activate it beside the Dark Altar.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Can I ask why I would do that?

lines.speaker: Veos
lines.text: It's best you don't.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Well, can't argue with that! I'll return when I'm done!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I really wish I would be warned about these things earlier...

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I have a right to know!

lines.speaker: Veos' Client
lines.text: YOU HAVE THE RIGHT TO KNOW NOTHING. KNOW YOUR PLACE.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What if I asked... nicely?

lines.speaker: Veos' Client
lines.text: How adorable. The power of Charos? You truly thought that I could be manipulated by such feeble magic?

lines.speaker: Veos' Client
lines.text: I'll tell you what, human. Since you tried so hard - I'll tell you my name.

lines.speaker: Xeric
lines.text: Xeric.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Why did you ask me to do all of this?

lines.speaker: Veos' Client
lines.text: When the time comes, you'll know.

lines.speaker: Veos' Client
lines.text: Right, before I release this humans feeble mind back to consciousness... I am a man of my word. I owe you a reward.

lines.speaker: Veos' Client
lines.text: Tell me, [player name], after speaking to each of the houses... which activities interest you the least? I can give you a small 'boost' of favour in that house.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I wouldn't mind a boost within the Hosidius house...

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I wouldn't mind a boost within the Arceuus house...

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I wouldn't mind a boost within the Lovakengj house...

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I wouldn't mind a boost within the Piscarilius house...

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I wouldn't mind a boost within the Shayzien house...

lines.speaker: Veos' Client
lines.text: Very well. The deed is done.

lines.speaker: Veos' Client
lines.text: Take these two lamps...

lines.speaker: Veos' Client
lines.text: You'll find you have gained... Up to 20% favour in [House]. They've decided to 'honour' your efforts in helping me.

lines.speaker: Veos' Client
lines.text: Word has spread of my return. The houses are now a little busy in their petty arguments to care about your loyalty. I imagine the speed you now gather favour within all households will be substantially faster.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Th-thank you...

lines.speaker: Veos' Client
lines.text: Until we meet again.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Wait! What if we need to speak to you again.

lines.speaker: Veos' Client
lines.text: I can continue to use this human as a conduit for communication. If you need reminding of my rewards, feel free to talk to him and I'll jump in.

lines.speaker: Veos' Client
lines.text: Other than that, farewell... [player name].

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I have a right to know!

lines.speaker: Veos' Client
lines.text: All in good time human. All in good time.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Why did you ask me to do all of this?

lines.speaker: Veos' Client
lines.text: When the time comes, you'll know.

lines.speaker: Veos' Client
lines.text: Right, before I release this humans feeble mind back to consciousness... I am a man of my word. I owe you a reward.

lines.speaker: Veos' Client
lines.text: Tell me, [player name], after speaking to each of the houses... which activities interest you the least? I can give you a small 'boost' of favour in that house.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I wouldn't mind a boost within the Hosidius house...

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I wouldn't mind a boost within the Arceuus house...

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I wouldn't mind a boost within the Lovakengj house...

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I wouldn't mind a boost within the Piscarilius house...

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I wouldn't mind a boost within the Shayzien house...

lines.speaker: Veos' Client
lines.text: Very well. The deed is done.

lines.speaker: Veos' Client
lines.text: Take these two lamps...

lines.speaker: Veos' Client
lines.text: You'll find you have gained... Up to 20% favour in [House]. They've decided to 'honour' your efforts in helping me.

lines.speaker: Veos' Client
lines.text: My influence is currently limited, but it does still exist. I imagine the speed you now gather favour within each house will be substantially faster.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Th-thank you...

lines.speaker: Veos' Client
lines.text: Until we meet again.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Wait! What if we need to speak to you again.

lines.speaker: Veos' Client
lines.text: I can continue to use this human as a conduit for communication. If you need reminding of my rewards, feel free to talk to him and I'll jump in.

lines.speaker: Veos' Client
lines.text: Other than that, farewell... [player name].

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I have a right to know!

lines.speaker: Veos' Client
lines.text: All in good time human. All in good time.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Why did you ask me to do all of this?

lines.speaker: Veos' Client
lines.text: When the time comes, you'll know.

lines.speaker: Veos' Client
lines.text: Right, before I release this humans feeble mind back to consciousness... I am a man of my word. I owe you a reward.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Veos, enough is enough! I've suffered through enough. Exploding orbs and burning quills...

lines.speaker: Veos
lines.text: [player name]? What are you talking about?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: You know darn well what I'm talking about!

lines.speaker: Veos
lines.text: [player name], I haven't spoken with you since bringing you to Kourend, I have no idea what you're on ab--

lines.speaker: Veos
lines.text: ARGH!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Veos, this isn't funny anymore... Are you alright? I did all that your client asked for me...

lines.speaker: Veos' Client
lines.text: You most certainly have.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Uhm... Veos?

lines.speaker: Veos' Client
lines.text: Heed my word. Your deeds will not go unthanked.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Who are you? What have you done with Veos?

lines.speaker: Veos' Client
lines.text: You care for him? How kind of you.

lines.speaker: Veos' Client
lines.text: Worry not. I'll ensure he's fine. He is of good use to me.

lines.speaker: Veos' Client
lines.text: As for who I am... well. That is of no concern to you.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I have a right to know!

lines.speaker: Veos' Client
lines.text: All in good time. All in good time.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Why did you ask me to do all of this?

lines.speaker: Veos' Client
lines.text: When the time comes, you'll know.

lines.speaker: Veos' Client
lines.text: Now, time to release this ones mind back to consciousness... Don't worry, I'll make sure he rewards you. After all, you've been very useful to me...

lines.speaker: Veos
lines.text: Hello again, [player name]! What can I do for you?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Veos, enough is enough! I've suffered through enough. Exploding orbs and burning quills...

lines.speaker: Veos
lines.text: [player name]? What are you talking about?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: You know darn well what I'm talking about!

lines.speaker: Veos
lines.text: [player name], I haven't spoken with you since bringing you to Zeah, I have no idea what you're on ab--

lines.speaker: Veos
lines.text: ARGH!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Veos, this isn't funny anymore... Are you alright? I did all that your client asked for me...

lines.speaker: Veos' Client
lines.text: You most certainly have.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Uhm... Veos?

lines.speaker: Veos' Client
lines.text: Heed my word. Your deeds will not go unthanked.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Who are you? What have you done with Veos?

lines.speaker: Veos' Client
lines.text: You care for this human? How pitiful.

lines.speaker: Veos' Client
lines.text: Worry not. I'll ensure he's fine. He is of good use to me.

lines.speaker: Veos' Client
lines.text: As for who I am... well. That is of no concern to you, human.
